description_long: This object consists of four large, cylindrical metal barrels with a weathered, rusty red exterior and a wide, off-white horizontal band around the middle. Each barrel features a yellow triangular warning symbol, indicating hazardous or dangerous contents, and the text 'XYZ CORP' is partially visible on the band. The barrels have visible dents, scratches, and grime, suggesting prolonged outdoor or industrial use. The tops of the barrels are flat with two small, round, raised caps or bungs for filling or emptying. The barrels are grouped closely together, with one lying on its side and the others standing upright. The overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, typical of containers used for storing chemicals, oil, or waste in industrial or urban environments.
description: A group of four weathered, red metal barrels with white bands, warning symbols, and industrial markings, showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Three upright barrels and one partially visible on its side, with clear warning symbols and 'XYZ CORP' text on the white band.
description_view_1: The barrels are seen from a different angle, with the one on its side more prominent and the warning symbol on its end clearly visible.
description_view_2: The side of the horizontal barrel is most visible, showing the full warning symbol, while the upright barrels display more of their side surfaces.
description_view_3: A top-down perspective with the tops of the upright barrels and the side of the horizontal barrel visible, highlighting the arrangement and surface wear.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: yellow warning triangles, 'XYZ CORP' text, grime and scratches
